name: Implement Liquid Gateway Provider Racing Protocol
desc: Build an L2 edge proxy to dynamically race LLM providers based on token cost, context availability, and latency, routing to the optimal node instantly.

name: Deploy HCFP Battle Validation Protocol
desc: Fork critical L3 tasks into 3 parallel streams and employ a Critic Agent to evaluate outputs using strict JSON schemas and logical coherence rubrics.

name: Swarm-to-Creative Context Translation
desc: Implement a semantic-to-aesthetic data translation pipeline that converts statistical/logical data into aesthetic visual tokens before AI image generation.

name: Integrate Network MIDI 2.0 UDP over MCP
desc: Establish real-time hardware-agent control by translating low-level UDP UMP streams to standard JSON-RPC 2.0 messages via MCP.

name: Deploy Maestro 3 Pilares Architecture
desc: Implement the Mensageiro, Tradutor, and Maestro endpoints (powered by Tone.js) to achieve sub-15ms latency for LLM-driven complex MIDI execution.

name: Establish Context Compaction Pipeline
desc: Route conversational inputs through an LLM distillation step (Context Compaction) to extract constraints and facts before atomic storage into the Vector Engine.

name: Re-index Semantic Memory via pgvectorscale
desc: Dynamically partition PostgreSQL vector memory, swapping between HNSW for <100M items and DiskANN for billion-scale cost efficiency.

name: Inject Cryptographic Provenance Hashes
desc: Apply SHA-256 origin hashes to all chunks ingested into 3D Vector Memory to protect against Agentic Memory Poisoning.

name: Activate Edge Proactive Recall Loop
desc: Deploy an L1 edge pre-processor to perform sub-millisecond similarity searches and inject relevant PostgreSQL vector snippets directly into the HeadyBuddy prompt.

name: Construct Agentic Observability Dashboard Core
desc: Initialize a Node/React service consuming OpenTelemetry logs to graph HeadyBuddy's schema validations, tool invocations, and memory recalls in real-time.

name: Enforce Schema-Guided Agentic Reasoning
desc: Eliminate free-text logic parsing in HeadyBuddy. Validate all AI planning, tool selections, and synthetic outputs firmly against pre-defined JSON schemas.

name: Implement Dynamic Permission Scope Monitoring
desc: Continuously monitor and apply the principle of least privilege to agent schemas, requiring human-in-the-loop override for destructive actions.

name: Construct 3D Vector Digital Twin Engine
desc: Build a spatial memory system using 3D vectors to mathematically map physical environments, constructing live Digital Twins fed by bi-directional real-time telemetry for autonomous simulation and predictive execution.

name: Deploy Sovereign LLM Execution System
desc: Implement an air-gapped, locally-hosted LLM execution loop (sovereign_llm_system) fully decoupled from cloud dependencies, enabling autonomous operation in restricted environments with zero external API latency.

name: Implement Advanced Context Protocol (ACP) Layer
desc: Extend MCP with JSON-RPC for non-linear, adaptive agent interactions. ACP enables dynamic compute allocation based on task complexity rather than static model routing, supporting the Convergence Epoch architecture.

name: Architect Hyper-Reactive Trading Widget
desc: Build a WebSocket-dominant trading GUI with Level 2 order book depth, OMS execution engine linkage, and sub-millisecond React re-renders for financial data velocity.

name: Implement Agent Session Survival Protocol
desc: Enable snapshot/recovery of agent state across context window resets via the L1 Edge Layer's proactive recall loop, guaranteeing zero-discontinuity awareness resumption.

name: Formalize IP Patent Filing Strategy
desc: Prepare utility patent filings for: (1) Liquid Gateway Dynamic Provider Racing/Arbitrage Engine, (2) HCFP Heterogeneous Adversarial Battle Validation, (3) Swarm-to-Creative Semantic-to-Aesthetic Data Translation.
